Lauren
Patrick
Principal Broker, Owner
A Letter from Lauren
To Anyone Who Wants to Work with People Who Actually Live This

My grandfather built homes in Portage County for decades. He believed every structure carried the weight of a family's future. I grew up watching him work with that kind of purpose. Real estate, in our family, was never abstract. It was something you honored.

My partner and I do real estate full time, every day, not just as agents but as investors. Right now we are running seven active flips, managing 131 rental doors, and operating four Airbnbs in Northeast Ohio and Florida with a fifth coming. Our mortgages and utilities are completely covered by cash flow. We built a life around this business because we believed in it completely.

VP Realty was built from inside that investor life. Every client we guide, every agent we train, every deal we touch gets the perspective of people who are doing this with their own money, their own properties, and their own risk on the line. That is not something you can fake. That is not something most brokerages can offer.

When you work with VP Realty, you are not getting someone who studied the market. You are getting someone who lives in it. This book shows you exactly what that means.

Lauren Patrick
Principal Broker, VP Realty
02
Full-Time Investor. Principal Broker.

Lauren
Patrick

Lauren and her fiancé do real estate full time, every single day, not just as agents but as investors. They currently manage 131 rental doors, running seven active flips across Northeast Ohio, and operate four Airbnbs in Cleveland, Northeast Ohio, and Florida with a fifth on the way. Their properties generate enough cash flow to cover all mortgages and utilities. This is not a side hustle. This is a built, running investment business.

Hard Money Lending and the Passive Flip Method

Lauren is also an active hard money lender to real estate investors who flip properties. She is currently building the Passive Flip Method, a course designed to help investors flip houses and generate passive income without being consumed by the process. Everything she teaches comes directly from what she is doing right now, with real capital and real properties, not theory from a classroom.

The Brokerage Supports the Investing

VP Realty was built to support an investor-first lifestyle. Lauren holds a Principal Broker license and a Mortgage Loan Officer license, which means she understands every deal from both the ownership side and the financing side. Clients do not get an agent who took a weekend course in investing. They get someone with 131 doors and seven active flips guiding their decisions.

Education, Community, and Credentials

Lauren graduated from Kent State University with a B.S. in Business and Marketing, is a member of the Greater Cleveland REIA, Lake Erie Landlords Association, National Association of Realtors, and the Akron Canton Association of Realtors. She hosts buyer and seller webinars, produces educational video content, and builds custom training programs for her agents.

Lauren Patrick
Principal Broker · MLO · Investor · Founder

03
The Brokerage

Investor-Led.
Brokerage-Backed.

VP Realty is run by full-time real estate investors. The brokerage exists to serve and support that investment business and the clients who want to access the same level of thinking. Every system, every agent, and every service here is built with an investor's mindset at the center.

5.0/5
Client Rating

31-plus verified reviews across Zillow, Google, and Birdeye. Consistent recognition for negotiation strength, market knowledge, and the kind of honesty that builds lasting trust.

2019
Year Founded

Built from the ground up by Lauren Patrick with structured systems and documented processes in place from day one. Not pieced together over time. Built with intention.

131
Rental Doors

Lauren and her fiancé manage 131 rental doors across Northeast Ohio. This is not a credential on paper. It is an active, running portfolio that informs every piece of guidance they give.

7 Flips
Active Right Now

Seven active house flips currently running in Northeast Ohio. Not historical stats. Not projections. Right now, today, with capital on the line and lessons being learned that go directly to clients.

The Airbnb Portfolio

Four Airbnbs in Cleveland, Northeast Ohio, and Florida, with a fifth on the way. Every mortgage and utility on these properties is fully covered by cash flow. Lauren and her fiancé live and travel freely between them because the passive income makes it possible. That is exactly the lifestyle the Passive Flip Method is designed to teach.

Hard Money Lending

Lauren is an active hard money lender to real estate investors who flip properties. This puts her inside deal structures that most brokers never see. When a client or agent brings a flip, Lauren evaluates it with the eye of a lender who has financed deals and an investor who has run them, simultaneously.

We are not agents who decided to invest on the side. We are investors who built a brokerage. That difference shows up in every single conversation we have.
Lauren Patrick, Principal Broker, VP Realty
04
Our Distinction

Six Reasons VP Realty Is in a Different Category

We do not compete on signage, social media followers, or years in the industry. We compete on what we are actually doing right now. Here is the real difference between VP Realty and everyone else in this market.

01
Broker and Lending Intelligence

Lauren holds both a Principal Broker license and a Mortgage Loan Officer license. She evaluates every deal from both sides of the table simultaneously. That means her pricing guidance, offer strategy, and financing advice come from a perspective most agents in Northeast Ohio are simply not equipped to provide.

02
131 Doors and 7 Active Flips Behind Every Opinion

Lauren and her fiancé are running 131 rental doors and seven active flips right now. When they advise on pricing, renovation scope, or rental yield, that advice comes from a portfolio generating real cash flow, not a CE course or a market report. This is what investor-backed guidance actually looks like.

03
The Passive Flip Method Mindset

Lauren is building the Passive Flip Method, a course for investors who want to flip houses without being consumed by the process. That same thinking drives how VP Realty approaches every deal: structure it well, systemize it, and make it perform without chaos. Clients and agents both benefit from an operator who thinks this way.

04
Systems That Execute Consistently

Every listing at VP Realty follows a documented launch process: photography guidance, an optimized MLS description, a complete pre-market checklist, and a social media distribution plan. Every agent operates inside a CRM with structured follow-up. The client experience does not depend on how someone is feeling that week.

05
Agents Who Are Trained and Led

Lauren personally builds the training curriculum for her agents. They receive real instruction, real feedback, and real accountability. This is not a brokerage where you figure it out alone. It is a brokerage where standards are set, communicated, and held, because the clients those agents serve deserve nothing less.

06
Small, Private, and Built to Be Flexible

VP Realty is not a big-box franchise with a corporate rulebook. We are a small, private brokerage, and that is a deliberate choice. It means we can move quickly, customize our support for each agent, and build systems that actually fit the way real deals get done in Northeast Ohio, not the way they get done in a training manual.

05

06
Who We Serve

Three Kinds of Clients.
One Unwavering Standard.

01
For Sellers
Priced Honestly. Marketed Strategically. Sold with Your Leverage Intact.

Selling is one of the most significant financial events of your life. We treat it exactly that way. We price with data and honest analysis, not inflated numbers designed to win the listing appointment. Every property receives a structured launch including photography guidance, an MLS-optimized description, social media distribution, and a complete pre-market checklist. We communicate at every stage. We negotiate without hesitating. You will always know what is happening and why, from the first conversation to the closing table.

02
For Buyers
Guided by Someone Who Understands Both the Deal and the Decision.

Buying a home is not just a transaction. It is a commitment that will shape your finances for years. We help you understand your financing position before you fall in love with a property, identify issues other agents overlook, and build offers with real strategy behind them. We work with first-time buyers who need education and experienced buyers who need sharp execution. Either way, you will never be rushed, pressured, or misguided about what you are buying or what it is genuinely worth.

03
For Investors
Run the Numbers First. Close the Deals That Actually Make Sense.

Lauren manages 131 rental doors, runs seven active flips, and lends hard money to other investors. Her fiancé is her full-time partner in this business. When you bring VP Realty an investment deal, you are sitting across from people who evaluated a deal this morning with their own capital. They understand ARV, cap rates, carrying costs, exit strategy, and when a number simply does not work. That kind of guidance is not available at most brokerages. It is not available because most brokers are not doing it.

07
For Agents

Small, Private, and Built Around You

VP Realty is small, private, and intentionally flexible by design. No corporate rulebook, no rigid structures that do not fit your business, no waiting weeks for a simple answer from someone who does not know your name. You get direct access to Lauren, who is an active investor and broker, and Kelly Zander, Million Dollar Club producer and team leader in the field every single day.

Agents who join VP Realty get a full backend built around them: transaction coordination, marketing, video, and paperwork support handled so they can focus entirely on selling and building relationships. That is the model. Lauren personally runs 30-minute business plan and accountability calls for agents ready to have that conversation. Call (330) 577-3546.

01
Custom Training Courses Built by Lauren
Real instruction built around real scenarios in this market. Not generic onboarding content. Actual knowledge you can apply on your very next deal.
02
Two Mentors: Investor and Field Producer
You get Lauren's investor and broker perspective plus Kelly Zander's Million Dollar Club, in-the-field sales expertise. Two completely different lenses. One team behind you.
03
Full Backend Support Built For You
Transaction coordination, video, marketing, and paperwork can all be handled behind the scenes. The model is simple: you go out and sell. VP Realty handles the rest so nothing slows you down.
04
MLS Access Across Multiple Ohio Markets
MLSNow and Dayton MLS access with structured auto-email systems already in place to keep your buyers and investors served without manual effort on every touchpoint.
05
Freedom No Big Box Can Give You
Because we are small and private, we can move fast, customize your setup, and build your model around how you actually work. Big brokerages cannot do this. We can and we do.
06
Full Scope: Residential to Commercial
Residential, land, investment, commercial, and leases. Diversify your income, expand your expertise, and earn across every property class with broker support on every deal.
